nodes.label: AI as initial brainstorming and final review tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole or primary workhorse
nodes.grounding_span: I like using AI as an initial starting point ... and something to end with

nodes.label: AI output trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really trust a lot of the output because it is so prone to confident hallucinations

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for rewording
nodes.grounding_span: the most useful thing AI does for me is rewording - it just makes the process go faster

nodes.label: AI as interactive query tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'm always right there along side it, mostly because I don't trust it much

nodes.label: Preserving human touch in communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to completely let go of the human aspect just yet

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I know that AI can be inaccurate (sometimes wildly)

nodes.label: Professional competence and reputation
nodes.grounding_span: if you rely on AI and it gets it wrong, you're still at fault ... it's still my reputation at stake

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: it just makes the process go faster

nodes.label: Human connection and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: having that human touch ... is just important

nodes.label: Cautious appreciation for AI's unique capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: little to no other tool else can really do what it does - answer nuanced questions, quickly, for free

nodes.label: Distrust due to hallucination risk
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really trust a lot of the output because it is so prone to confident hallucinations

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for rewording efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: the most useful thing AI does for me is rewording - it just makes the process go faster

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not a massive fan of the idea that its just bots talking to bots

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for obscure case discovery
nodes.grounding_span: when an obscure case surfaces in seconds with the help of AI - that's great

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's repetitive errors
nodes.grounding_span: those times were I correct it and it either rebuffs me with the same hallucination or just keeps apologising ... that gets kind of annoying

nodes.label: Piecewise decomposition of queries
nodes.grounding_span: I word my questions to get answers piece by piece instead of giving it a chunk of information

nodes.label: Expertise-based filtering and verification
nodes.grounding_span: a lot of it is just down to whether you know your stuff or not - you can tell pretty quickly
